treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted for shortness of breath and evaluated for fluid around the lung and heart.
Thoracentesis performed to drain pleural effusion.
Pericardiocentesis performed to drain pericardial effusion.
Patient monitored in cardiac intensive care unit overnight post-surgery.

patient_outcome.final_status: Alert and interactive, discharged to an extended care facility.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Requires follow-up appointments with the 'Structural Heart Team' and 'Cardiac Surgery Team' for evaluation of valve repair.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Further evaluation for heart surgery and valve repair will continue as an outpatient.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient had to stay in the hospital due to shortness of breath and fluid around the lungs and heart.
